texts.nameSubtitle: Enter your name and I will prepare a magical celebration with cake, roses, and a surprise letter.
texts.wishSubtitle: May your day be filled with laughter, roses, and sweet memories.
texts.cakeSubtitle: Move your mouse over the knife and click on cake area to cut.
texts.cakeInstruction: Click the cake area once to make a perfect cut.

guideMessages.intro: Woof! I am Bruno the golden retriever. I will guide you through this celebration.
guideMessages.nameScreen: Enter your name so I can personalize everything for you.
guideMessages.wishScreen: Tap Cut the Cake. The cake, candles and roses are ready.
guideMessages.cakeScreen: Move your mouse to control the knife and click once to cut.
guideMessages.letterScreen: Enjoy your letter and bouquet from Pravesh.

letterTemplate: You are truly special, and your smile brings warmth to everyone around you.
Keep believing in your dreams because your strength, heart, and spirit are powerful.
May this year bring you peace, courage, beautiful memories, and endless happiness.
Happy Birthday, {name}. Keep shining and keep growing.
